question:
A-1. Let \( f(x)=a_{1} \sin x+a_{2} \sin 2 x+\cdots+a_{n} \sin n x \), where \( a_{1}, a_{2}, \cdots, a_{n} \) are real numbers and where \( n \) is a positive integer. Given that \( |f(x)| \leqq|\sin x| \) for all real \( x \), prove that
\[
\left|a_{1}+2 a_{2}+\cdots+n a_{n}\right| \leqq 1
\]

descriptive_long.question:
A-1. Let \( sinecomb(realvari)=coeffone \sin realvari+coefftwo \sin 2 realvari+\cdots+coeffnth \sin termcount realvari \), where \( coeffone, coefftwo, \cdots, coeffnth \) are real numbers and where \( termcount \) is a positive integer. Given that \( |sinecomb(realvari)| \leqq|\sin realvari| \) for all real \( realvari \), prove that
\[
\left|coeffone+2 coefftwo+\cdots+termcount coeffnth\right| \leqq 1
\]

descriptive_long_confusing.question:
A-1. Let \( pineapples(gravestone)=bluewhale \sin gravestone+redcushion \sin 2 gravestone+\cdots+bentpaper \sin teacupholder gravestone \), where \( bluewhale, redcushion, \cdots, bentpaper \) are real numbers and where \( teacupholder \) is a positive integer. Given that \( |pineapples(gravestone)| \leqq|\sin gravestone| \) for all real \( gravestone \), prove that
\[
\left|bluewhale+2 redcushion+\cdots+teacupholder bentpaper\right| \leqq 1
\]

descriptive_long_misleading.question:
A-1. Let \( staticvalue(outcomeval)=antifirstco \sin outcomeval+antisecondco \sin 2 outcomeval+\cdots+antilastco \sin unboundedcount outcomeval \), where \( antifirstco, antisecondco, \cdots, antilastco \) are real numbers and where \( unboundedcount \) is a positive integer. Given that \( |staticvalue(outcomeval)| \leqq|\sin outcomeval| \) for all real \( outcomeval \), prove that
\[
\left|antifirstco+2 antisecondco+\cdots+unboundedcount antilastco\right| \leqq 1
\]

garbled_string.question:
A-1. Let \( qzxwvtnp(hjgrksla)=mnlvprqe \sin hjgrksla+fskdjmwe \sin 2 hjgrksla+\cdots+zprxclou \sin gubkwerd hjgrksla \), where \( mnlvprqe, fskdjmwe, \cdots, zprxclou \) are real numbers and where \( gubkwerd \) is a positive integer. Given that \( |qzxwvtnp(hjgrksla)| \leqq|\sin hjgrksla| \) for all real \( hjgrksla \), prove that
\[
\left|mnlvprqe+2 fskdjmwe+\cdots+gubkwerd zprxclou\right| \leqq 1
\]

kernel_variant.question:
Let k_1,\ldots ,k_m be distinct positive integers and p_1,\ldots ,p_m , q_1,\ldots ,q_m real numbers.  
Set  
 H(x)=\Sigma _{i=1}^m [ p_i arctan(k_i x)+q_i sin(k_i x) ].  
Assume  
 |H(x)| \leq  5(|arctan x|+|sin x|) for every real x.  
Prove  
 |k_1(p_1+q_1)+k_2(p_2+q_2)+\ldots +k_m(p_m+q_m)| \leq  10.
kernel_variant.solution: Note that arctan 0 = sin 0 = 0 and each has derivative 1; hence (arctan x+sin x)/x \to  2. Consequently |\Sigma k_i(p_i+q_i)| = |H'(0)|, equal to lim|H(x)|/(arctan x+sin x)\cdot (arctan x+sin x)/x, whence \leq  5\cdot 2 = 10, because |H(x)| \leq  5|arctan x+sin x|. No further subtleties arise.

_replacement_note.reason: Original kernel variant was too easy compared to the original problem
